text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Hi Michael, it’s Richard Carter. I hope you're doing well.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Hi Richard! I'm doing great, thanks for asking. How about you?
segments.speaker: local party

text: I'm good, just having some issues with my car again.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: I’m sorry to hear that. What seems to be the problem?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Well, I think the brakes might need attention. They've been making a weird noise lately.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: That doesn’t sound good. When was the last time they were checked?
segments.speaker: local party

text: It’s been a while now, probably around six months.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: We should definitely take a look. Would you like to schedule a brake inspection?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Yes, please. How much is that?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: The brake inspection is $30 and usually takes about 30 minutes.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That sounds reasonable. Can I come in tomorrow?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Sure! We have availability at 10 AM or 2 PM. Which works better for you?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Let’s do 10 AM.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Great! I’ll put you down for a brake inspection at 10 AM tomorrow.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Perfect. Also, I need to get an oil change done soon, too.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: We can take care of that as well. It's $40 to $60 depending on the oil type.
segments.speaker: local party

text: I usually go for the synthetic oil, so I’ll expect it to be on the higher end.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Got it. We could do that right after the brake inspection if you'd like.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That would be great, let's do that.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: So, that would be a brake inspection and an oil change tomorrow.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Yes, and could you recommend a good brand for the oil?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! We usually recommend Mobil 1 for synthetic oil. It's reliable.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Sounds good. Anything else I should know before coming in?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Just remember to bring your keys and any other details about your car's issues if you notice anything else.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Will do, Michael. Thanks for the help!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: My pleasure, Richard! Looking forward to seeing you tomorrow at 10 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thanks again! Bye.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Bye!
segments.speaker: local party
